dict.string: Ratspeak uses Bluetooth to connect to RNode LoRa radios and Ratlow mesh devices for off-grid communication.
Ratspeak uses Bluetooth to connect to RNode LoRa radios and Ratlow mesh devices for off-grid communication.
Required when you enable a TCP, Local, or Bluetooth Peer interface in Network settings so Ratspeak can reach other nodes on your local network.
Ratspeak accesses your camera so you can take photos or videos to send in a message.
Ratspeak accesses your photo library so you can attach existing photos or videos to a message.
Ratspeak uses your microphone for voice calls and when recording videos to send in a message.
